hesitantly.explanation_en: in a way that shows you are nervous or unsure
hesitantly.example_sentence: He hesitantly asked if he could leave early.
hesitantly.original_sentence: Someone hesitantly says something like, well, you might cut down crime if you established more youth centers.

cut down.explanation_en: to reduce the amount of something
cut down.example_sentence: I am trying to cut down on sugar to stay healthy.
cut down.original_sentence: Someone hesitantly says something like, well, you might cut down crime if you established more youth centers.

before long.example_sentence: Don't worry, he will be here before long.
before long.original_sentence: Before long, the group, which ten minutes ago was solidly against the idea, now begins to work up real enthusiasm.

work up.explanation_en: to develop or build up a feeling or energy
work up.example_sentence: I had to work up the courage to speak in front of the class.
work up.original_sentence: Before long, the group, which ten minutes ago was solidly against the idea, now begins to work up real enthusiasm.

eliminate.explanation_en: to remove or get rid of something completely
eliminate.example_sentence: We need to eliminate all errors in the report.

stems from.example_sentence: Her success stems from years of hard work.
stems from.original_sentence: Most crime stems from the low income levels.

spot.explanation_en: to see or notice someone or something
spot.example_sentence: Can you spot the difference between these two pictures?
spot.original_sentence: Conduct research to spot potential criminals before they commit a crime.

law enforcement.explanation_en: the police and other groups that make sure laws are obeyed
law enforcement.example_sentence: Law enforcement officers are trained to handle dangerous situations.
law enforcement.original_sentence: Educate law enforcement personnel in positive methods of reform.

tabulate.explanation_en: to arrange information in a list or table
tabulate.example_sentence: The assistant will tabulate the survey results.
tabulate.original_sentence: These are just samples of the 78 specific ideas I've tabulated that could help accomplish the goal of eliminating jails.

paves the way.explanation_en: to make it easier for something to happen in the future
paves the way.example_sentence: This discovery paves the way for new medical treatments.
paves the way.original_sentence: Believing something can be done paves the way for creative solutions.

destructive.example_sentence: Criticism can be very destructive if it is not helpful.
destructive.original_sentence: Believing something can't be done is destructive thinking.

genuinely.example_sentence: She was genuinely sorry for what she said.
genuinely.original_sentence: The political leaders who do not genuinely believe permanent world peace can be established will fail because their minds are closed to creative ways to bring about peace.

bring about.example_sentence: The new government hopes to bring about positive change.
bring about.original_sentence: The political leaders who do not genuinely believe permanent world peace can be established will fail because their minds are closed to creative ways to bring about peace.

inevitable.explanation_en: certain to happen and unable to be avoided
inevitable.example_sentence: It was inevitable that they would eventually argue.
inevitable.original_sentence: The economists who believe business depressions are inevitable will not develop creative ways to beat the business cycle.

in a similar fashion.example_sentence: In a similar fashion, you can learn to cook by watching videos.
in a similar fashion.original_sentence: In a similar fashion, you can find ways to like a person if you believe you can.

put the brakes on.explanation_en: to slow down or stop an activity
put the brakes on.example_sentence: The company had to put the brakes on its expansion plans due to lack of money.

constructively.explanation_en: in a way that is useful and helpful
constructively.example_sentence: We should use feedback to think constructively about our work.
constructively.original_sentence: Believe and you'll start thinking constructively.
